creator: fatih@gandi.net
text:
Created attachment 196388
port files

NFS-Ganesha is an NFSv3,v4,v4.1 fileserver that runs in user mode.

WWW: https://github.com/nfs-ganesha/nfs-ganesha

FSAL_VFS is the only FSAL thoroughly tested; CephFS, GlusterFS and RGW FSALs require more recent ports.

Tested and running on FreeBSD 11, should work fine on other versions.
